SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.optimization.valuechain

Class ValueChainObjective.ValueResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.optimization.valuechain.ValueChainObjective.ValueResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
ValueChainObjective
public static class ValueChainObjective.ValueResult extends Object implements Serializable
Immutable breakdown of the economic value of a single operating point.

  • Constructor Details

    • ValueResult

      public ValueResult(double revenueNokPerDay, double energyCostNokPerDay, double carbonCostNokPerDay, double co2TonnePerDay, double netValueNokPerDay)
      Creates an immutable value result.
      Parameters:
      revenueNokPerDay - sales revenue in currency per day
      energyCostNokPerDay - energy operating cost in currency per day
      carbonCostNokPerDay - carbon cost in currency per day
      co2TonnePerDay - emitted CO2 in tonnes per day
      netValueNokPerDay - net value in currency per day
